meta.title: AWS-DEA-4: Ingestion, Warehousing, and Governance on AWS

questions.stem: A data team needs to capture application events at high throughput and allow multiple consumers to process the same ordered stream independently. Which service is the best fit?

questions.stem: An engineer is designing a near-real-time analytics pipeline on AWS. Which TWO statements are accurate? (Select TWO)

options.text: Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink is suitable for stateful stream processing.

options.text: Amazon Data Firehose is mainly designed as a managed delivery service, not a general-purpose stream processor.

options.text: AWS Glue crawlers are the preferred engine for sub-second event processing.
Amazon S3 event notifications provide ordered replayable streams for many independent consumers.
